intentSynonyms: get a flight price calendar in priceline
look up a flight price calendar in priceline
fetch a single flight price calendar in priceline
view one specific flight price calendar in priceline
get flight price calendar in priceline
flight fare forecast for a date range in priceline
description: Get Priceline's fare forecast for a route over a date range. Returns the cheapest available fare for each date (or date combination for round-trips), along with departure/arrival times and stop counts. Pass a single `trips` entry for one-way, or two entries (outbound + return) for round-trip. Each trip can be a single date (`depart_date`) or a date window (`depart_date_from`/`depart_date_to`). Useful for finding the cheapest date to fly before booking.

depart_date.description: Single departure date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Provide either this or depart_date_range, not both.

depart_date_from.description: Start of departure date window in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pair with depart_date_to for range searches.

depart_date_to.description: End of departure date window in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pair with depart_date_from for range searches.

items.description: A single flight slice (leg). For one-way pass one slice; for round-trip pass two (outbound + return).

trips.description: Flight slices — 1 for one-way, 2 for round-trip, up to 6 for multi-city
